participants.name: Cade Klubnik
participants.notes: Unofficial 40 times were 4.57 and 4.58; consensus/official time reported as 4.65. Height measured at 6-1.7 (73.7 inches) at pro day. 10-yard split of 1.58. Dealt with ankle and wrist injuries in senior season. Arms and hands from Combine measurement (31 1/8 arms, 9 1/4 hands). Did throwing drills.

participants.name: Blake Miller
participants.notes: Combine attendee. Did positional drills (kick slide, shuffle, 3-cone shuttle) at pro day. Full combine testing numbers used in lieu of pro day testing for most drills. Wingspan topped 80 inches at Combine per CBS Sports. Potential first-round pick.

participants.name: Peter Woods
participants.notes: Did NOT run 40-yard dash due to minor hamstring injury; ran 10-yard split only (consensus 1.67 seconds). Combine measurements: 6-2+, 298 lbs, 31 1/4 arms, 76 3/8 wingspan. Weighed 302 at pro day per Post and Courier (leaned down). Vertical of 29 inches and broad jump of 8-8 (104 inches) at pro day, both likely hampered by hamstring. Did not bench at pro day or Combine. Did not participate in Combine on-field drills.

participants.name: T.J. Parker
participants.notes: Did positional drills only at pro day; did not participate in testing. Combine numbers: 40 of 4.68, broad jump of 10-0 (120 inches). Did not bench at pro day. Listed at 6-3, 260 per scouting profiles. Potential first-round pick.

participants.name: DeMonte Capehart
participants.notes: Did positional drills only at pro day; all testing numbers from NFL Combine. Combine: 4.85 forty, 33.5 vertical, 8-11 (107 inch) broad, 1.71 10-yard split. Measured 6-5, 313 at Combine with 33 7/8 arms and 10 1/4 hands.

participants.name: Antonio Williams
participants.notes: Combine attendee. Did positional drills including 3-cone and short shuttle at pro day per photo/video evidence. Specific pro day testing numbers not reported in available sources beyond positional drill participation.

participants.name: Adam Randall
participants.notes: WR-turned-RB. Combine attendee. Did positional drills (receiver/RB drills, short shuttle) at pro day. Combine numbers: 4.50 forty, 37 vertical, 124 broad (10-4), 26 bench. Specific pro day testing numbers not separately reported.

participants.name: Wade Woodaz
participants.notes: PFF official results: Height 6-3 3/8 (75.375), weight 234, forty 4.52, 10-yard split 1.55, broad 9-9 (117 inches), shuttle 4.50, three-cone 7.27. Unofficial broadcast times were 4.51 and 4.46. The Clemson Insider listed him at 6-3, 236. Did not attend Combine.

participants.name: Jeadyn Lukus
participants.notes: Standout performer. Unofficial 40 times of 4.39 and 4.38; consensus/official time 4.41. Broad jump of 11-7 (139 inches) would have broken 2026 NFL Combine record. Did not attend Combine.

participants.name: Walker Parks
participants.notes: Unofficial 40 times of 5.00 and 4.96; Post and Courier reports official 40 of 5.11. 31 reps on bench press (would have tied for 3rd-best at Combine). Did short shuttle per photo evidence. Did not attend Combine. Has lengthy injury history including ankle arthritis.

participants.name: Ryan Linthicum
participants.notes: Unofficial 40 times of 5.44 and 5.37. Appeared to suffer shoulder issue during bench press and may not have completed it. Did not attend Combine. Center.

participants.name: Cade Denhoff
participants.notes: Unofficial 40 times of 4.64 and 4.72; best unofficial time 4.64. Did 40-yard dash, position drills, short shuttle, 3-cone per Getty Images photo evidence. Did not attend Combine.

participants.name: Zaire Patterson
participants.notes: Unofficial 40 times of 4.98 and 4.90. Did 40-yard dash, 3-cone shuttle, short shuttle, position drills per Getty Images photo evidence. Did not attend Combine.

participants.name: Philip Florenzo
participants.notes: Long snapper. Unofficial 40 times of 5.04 and 4.96. Did 3-cone shuttle per photo evidence. Did not attend Combine.

participants.name: Holden Caspersen
participants.notes: Long snapper. Unofficial 40 times of 4.93 and 4.83. Did vertical jump per photo evidence. Did not attend Combine.

participants.name: Avieon Terrell
participants.notes: Did NOT test at pro day. Late scratch due to minor hamstring injury suffered during on-field drills at NFL Combine. Scheduled private workout for March 30. Combine attendee but did not run 40 at Combine either. Projected first-round pick.

participants.name: Tristan Leigh
participants.notes: Did NOT test at pro day. Late scratch due to nagging injury. Was present at pro day facility but did not participate in any testing. Will hold private pro day later this spring.

additional_notes: Held indoors at Poe Indoor Facility, Clemson, SC. All 32 NFL teams represented with 70+ scouts/personnel. One CFL team (Winnipeg Blue Bombers) and multiple NASCAR teams also scouted. 40-yard dash times are labeled as 'consensus times from NFL scouting personnel in attendance' per Clemson Athletics (not unofficial times from live broadcast). Unofficial/broadcast times from TigerNet live updates are noted in individual player notes where they differ from official consensus times. 15 Tigers tested (16 listed minus Avieon Terrell who sat out; Tristan Leigh was also a late scratch). 9 of the 15 had attended the NFL Combine. Several Combine attendees (T.J. Parker, DeMonte Capehart, Blake Miller) only did positional drills at pro day and relied on Combine numbers for testing. Peter Woods did not run a 40 due to hamstring but completed most other drills. Ryan Linthicum appeared to suffer a shoulder issue during bench press. The official Clemson Athletics results PDF was referenced by multiple sources but the full table was not extractable from search results; numbers here are compiled from multiple reporter accounts and the PFF pro day tracker.
